Very good service

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente el dueño o socio no nos dejó ir al baño  ( los tenían clausurados) después de cargar nafta. Y nos mando al baño público de la estación de autobuses. Si señor! habíamos cargado ahí, no éramos transeúntes.  No funciona la máquina para cargar agua. Por lo tanto tenes que esperar adentro para que puedan brindarte agua caliente. La espera es demasiado. ya que hay poco personal. Los playeros muy buena onda y cordiales.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, the owner or partner wouldn't let us use the restroom (they were closed) after we filled up with gas. He sent us to the public restroom at the bus station. Yes, sir! We had filled up there; we weren't just passing through. The water pump wasn't working, so you have to wait inside for hot water. The wait is extremely long because there are so few staff members. The attendants, however, were very friendly and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5cy1mT1ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un día con muchos autos y turistas, la atención fue rápido y funcionaba la APP de YPF para pagar, evitando contacto físicos con lapiceras, papeles, posnet, y/o dinero, etc.

(Translated by Google)
On a busy day with many cars and tourists, the service was quick and the YPF app worked for payment, avoiding physical contact with pens, papers, POS terminals, and/or money, etc.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5M0thVVNREAE
